title: TTS — single speaker
summary: Render text as speech with a chosen prebuilt voice. Inline natural-language tags ([whispers], [excitedly]) and prosody hints in the prompt itself shape delivery.
notes: Output is raw 24 kHz mono 16-bit PCM (audio/L16). The sample wraps it in a WAV container so the response panel can play it inline.
Available prebuilt voices include Kore, Puck, Zephyr, Charon, and ~26 others — see the docs page for the full set.
Prosody and style come from the prompt text itself (prefix with 'Say cheerfully:', drop in '[whispers]', '[laughs]', etc.). There is no separate style-vector parameter.
